modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Signature not appearing when printing from Adobe Acrobat Pro.

full_description_text: The user is trying to print a fillable PDF that includes a signature line. However, when they print the document, the signature does not show up on the printed form. This issue seems to occur consistently, indicating a potential problem with how Adobe Acrobat Pro handles the signature field during printing.
short_description: Signature not appearing when printing from Adobe Acrobat Pro.
description: The user is trying to print a fillable PDF that includes a signature line. However, when they print the document, the signature does not show up on the printed form. This issue seems to occur consistently, indicating a potential problem with how Adobe Acrobat Pro handles the signature field during printing.
